race.description: Ipswich Party Hire F&M Mdn Plate
race.comment: LISTEN JANI (8) is unlucky to still be a maiden going down by the narrowest of margins last time out and strikes a very winnable contest here. Gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim and strips fitter second-up from the break. Rates the testing material against this line-up. EXTREME TASTE (2) has been right there in all three career outings to date and is another to get some weight relief. Looms as the main danger. ARCTIC BRIGHT (5) has had a few chances but has placed two of three over this distance range and is usually thereabouts. Top-three aspirations. ASSUMED (6) brings NSW formlines to the table and must be respected out of the champion Waller yard. Keep very safe.
